description: Letter. A Hebrew address is all that survives from a letter written by Shelomo b. Eliyyahu, the judge, to the school of higher studies (Heb. midrash) of Yiṣḥaq b. Ḥalfon, in the period of Avraham Maimonides. (Information from Frenkel. See also Goitein, Med. Soc. 5:418, 624, no. 16)
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
